name: SecLists
desc: SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types …
descFull: SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.
